title: Jarvis Gao
text:
About Me
I am currently a graduate student at Columbia University.
Previously, I studied at Shanghai University of Finance and Economics, majoring in finance.
Professionally, I have multiple internship experiences in hedge funds.
Separately I am interested in Formula 1 and Basketball.
